text:
Hello, I bought this https://electrotounes.tn/pc-portable and when I open three software the computer suddenly closes there is also the loading of the pages is heavy !!!
My computer has become excessively slow for a few days. I am not very knowledgeable in computers but can follow instructions if explained for a beginner!!!
my pc became very slow. Yesterday everything was working fine, I played GTA V at more than 60 fps minecraft too (I have a gtx 1050 with an i5 9300 and 8gb of ram). And this morning it's a disaster I can not do more than 15fps and even google chrome bug a lot.
